queries.question: Display action films and adventure films which star Tom Cruise.
queries.sql:
SELECT Films.title 
FROM Genres JOIN Film_Genres ON Genres.id = Film_Genres.film_genre_id JOIN Films ON Film_Genres.film_id = Films.film_id JOIN Film_Stars ON Films.film_id = Film_Stars.film_id JOIN Stars ON Film_Stars.film_star_id = Stars.id
WHERE (Genres.genre = "Action" OR Genres.genre = "Adventure") AND Stars.star_name = "Tom Cruise"
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/filmmaking#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/filmmaking/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?title WHERE {
  ?genres a :Genres .
  ?film_genres a :Film_Genre .
  ?film_genres p:hasGenres ?genres .
  ?films a :Films .
  ?film_genres p:hasFilms ?films .
  ?film_stars a :Film_Stars .
  ?film_stars p:hasFilms ?films .
  ?stars a :Stars .
  ?film_stars p:hasStars ?stars .
  ?films p:title ?title .
  ?genres p:genre ?genre_w .
  ?genres p:genre ?genre_w2 .
  ?stars p:star_name ?star_name_w .
  FILTER((((STR(?genre_w) = "Action" || STR(?genre_w2) = "Adventure")) && STR(?star_name_w) = "Tom Cruise"))
}

queries.sql:

FROM Genres JOIN Film_Genres ON Genres.id = Film_Genres.film_genre_id JOIN Films ON Film_Genres.film_id = Films.film_id JOIN Film_Stars ON Films.film_id = Film_Stars.film_id JOIN Stars ON Film_Stars.film_star_id = Stars.id

PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/filmmaking#>

  ?genres p:genre ?genre_w2 .

ambiguous_dsl.question: Display action films and adventure films which star Tom Cruise.
ambiguous_dsl.choice_dsl:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/filmmaking#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/filmmaking/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
CHOICE attachment {
  high: { SELECT ?title WHERE {
  ?genres a :Genres .
  ?film_genres a :Film_Genre .
  ?film_genres p:hasGenres ?genres .
  ?films a :Films .
  ?film_genres p:hasFilms ?films .
  ?film_stars a :Film_Stars .
  ?film_stars p:hasFilms ?films .
  ?stars a :Stars .
  ?film_stars p:hasStars ?stars .
  ?films p:title ?title .
  ?genres p:genre ?genre_w .
  ?genres p:genre ?genre_w2 .
  ?stars p:star_name ?star_name_w .
  FILTER((((STR(?genre_w) = "Action" || STR(?genre_w2) = "Adventure")) && STR(?star_name_w) = "Tom Cruise"))
} }
  low: { SELECT ?title WHERE {
  ?genres a :Genres .
  ?film_genres a :Film_Genre .
  ?film_genres p:hasGenres ?genres .
  ?films a :Films .
  ?film_genres p:hasFilms ?films .
  ?film_stars a :Film_Stars .
  ?film_stars p:hasFilms ?films .
  ?stars a :Stars .
  ?film_stars p:hasStars ?stars .
  ?films p:title ?title .
  ?genres p:genre ?genre_w .
  ?genres p:genre ?genre_w2 .
  ?stars p:star_name ?star_name_w .
  FILTER((STR(?genre_w) = "Action" || (STR(?genre_w2) = "Adventure" && STR(?star_name_w) = "Tom Cruise")))
} }
}
